summary: Applied ADR 0251 from the latest origin/main-based worktree by declaring stage-scoped smoke suites, enforcing smoke evidence in the promotion pipeline, seeding Windmill with the same repo-managed smoke runner, and hardening the live worker checkout so worker-local Windmill execution and approval validation both succeed end to end.

verification.observed: The focused pytest slices for tests/test_windmill_integration_wrappers.py, tests/test_integration_suite.py, tests/test_stage_smoke_suites.py, tests/test_windmill_playbook.py, tests/test_windmill_default_operations_surface.py, tests/test_backup_coverage_ledger.py, tests/test_backup_coverage_ledger_windmill.py, tests/test_disaster_recovery.py, and tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py all passed after the worker-local runtime and checkout sync fixes.

./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards passed and ANSIBLE_HOME=$PWD/.ansible-home-apply ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/windmill.yml --syntax-check passed from the isolated worktree.

make converge-windmill succeeded twice with committed evidence in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0251-converge-windmill-rerun-12.txt and receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0251-converge-windmill-rerun-13.txt, including successful stage smoke suite verification and validation-gate status checks.

verification.check: Direct stage smoke suite helper execution
verification.observed: scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py successfully ran f/lv3/stage-smoke-suites with payload {"service":"windmill","environment":"production"}; the returned targets resolved windmill_url to the worker-local http://127.0.0.1:8000 endpoint.

On docker-runtime-lv3, python3 scripts/policy_checks.py --validate, python3 scripts/command_catalog.py --check-approval --command converge-windmill --requester-class human_operator --approver-classes human_operator --validation-passed --preflight-passed --receipt-planned, and python3 config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py --repo-path /srv/proxmox_florin_server all passed after the worker mirror began syncing .gitea/workflows.

A direct scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py replay of f/lv3/windmill_healthcheck returned status ok with hostname docker-runtime-lv3 and confirmed the current live worker runtime is healthy after the ADR 0251 replay.

notes: This branch-local receipt captures the successful latest-origin/main replay that preceded the protected-file integration on main.

The worker-local validation path initially failed because .gitea/workflows was absent from the mirrored checkout; syncing that hidden path fixed command approval validation without requiring manual server edits.

Worker-side command approval emitted a non-fatal mutation-audit permission warning for /srv/proxmox_florin_server/.local/state/mutation-audit/mutation-audit.jsonl, but the governed approval and gate-status checks still returned success.

The later mainline integration updates VERSION, changelog.md, README.md, versions/stack.yaml, release notes, and the generated platform manifest without changing the already-verified live workload payload.
